title: Tick Control in Inwood, Manhattan | $125 – $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Inwood, Manhattan. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Starting at $125. Same-day service available.
intro: Inwood's abundant green spaces, including Inwood Hill Park and Fort Tryon Park, make it one of Manhattan's most scenic neighborhoods—but also increase the risk of tick exposure. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Inwood, protecting residents and their pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective treatments tailored to Inwood's unique landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Inwood for over a decade, understanding the specific tick challenges posed by the neighborhood's proximity to wooded parkland and the Hudson River. Our eco-friendly treatments are safe for children and pets, and we offer flexible scheduling to accommodate the busy lives of Inwood families.
localContext: Inwood's pre-war buildings, garden apartments, and single-family homes near Isham Park and the Dyckman Street area require specialized tick prevention strategies. The neighborhood's extensive tree canopy and connection to natural areas make regular tick treatments essential, especially during spring and summer months when outdoor activities in local parks are at their peak.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Inwood's proximity to Inwood Hill Park and Fort Tryon Park creates ideal tick habitats. These wooded areas support deer and rodent populations that carry ticks, which can then migrate to residential yards and gardens. Professional tick control protects your family and pets from Lyme disease, anaplasmosis, and other tick-borne illnesses prevalent in the area.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Inwood range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments, seasonal packages, and year-round protection plans. All quotes include a thorough inspection and customized treatment strategy for your specific property.

faqs.question: When is the best time for tick treatment in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Inwood typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. We recommend starting treatments in early spring before tick populations explode. Monthly or bi-monthly treatments during peak season provide optimal protection, especially if your property borders parkland or you have pets that frequent outdoor areas.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Our treatments target ticks in lawn areas, shrubs, and perimeter zones where ticks are most active. We recommend keeping pets and children inside for 2-3 hours after application, after which treated areas are completely safe for normal activity.
